turns.user_message: I used to feel pretty okay about myself, but lately I don't. It's just been a bad week.
This feeling that I'm not good enough keeps coming back now. I can't seem to shake it off like I used to.
I feel like a completely different person from who I was before. Nothing about me feels worthwhile anymore.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This just started recently.
